channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Oil prices pull back on report U.S.-Iran agreement to extend ceasefire awaits Trump approval
item.description: Oil prices pulled back Thursday, erasing earlier gains on a report that U.S. and Iranian negotiators reached an agreement to extend ceasefire.

item.title: Core inflation hit an annual rate of 3.3% in April, as expected, Fed’s preferred gauge shows
item.description: The PCE price index for April was expected to show an annual inflation rate of 3.8% for all items and 3.3% for core.

item.title: New York passes Mamdani's pied-a-terre tax. Here's who pays and how much
item.description: Citadel CEO Ken Griffin became the face of the tax after New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani posted a video in front of Griffin's penthouse apartment.

item.title: Airlines, hotels warn against Trump admin threat to international flights to 'sanctuary cities'
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin said the Trump administration is considering pulling international flight processing in "sanctuary cities."

item.title: AI play Nebius is surging after mysterious new hedge fund manager reveals stake. Here are his other holdings
item.description: The fund invests in publicly traded companies expected to benefit from AI adoption — including semiconductor, infrastructure and power firms.

item.title: CFTC bid to vacate order against Winklevoss' crypto exchange 'very unusual,' ex-agency chief says
item.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission is looking to undo a $5 million civil penalty against the Gemini, which was founded by the Winklevoss twins.

item.title: Ro Khanna is taking his economic message on the road. Will it lead to the White House?
item.description: Rep. Ro Khanna wasn't in the Rust Belt to campaign. But he could be soon.

item.title: Reality star's long shot L.A. mayoral candidacy becomes surprise test for Democrats
item.description: Spencer Pratt is polling around 22%, just behind Democratic Mayor Karen Bass, in the Los Angeles mayoral primary, raising the odds of a November runoff.

item.title: Waymo opens Ojai robotaxis to select riders as company aims to lower cost of fleet expansion
item.description: Alphabet's Waymo is adding new vehicles to its fleet of public robotaxis and is opening up its roomier Ojai vehicles to some riders.

item.title: Mike Khouw: I was wrong about Zscaler. Here's how I'm managing the trade
item.description: Khouw's thesis this week for a bearish-to-bullish reversal rested on the idea that ZS had been unfairly punished.

item.title: Trump Accounts app launches — here's how to get started
item.description: Families can now download a Trump Accounts app to track the new investment accounts, which offer a $1,000 pilot program contribution for eligible children.

item.title: More workers are raiding their 401(k)s as average balances fall, Fidelity says
item.description: Retirement account balances sank at the start of 2026 amid market swings, according to Fidelity. At the same time, more savers tapped their accounts for cash.

item.title: Unusual Machines and other drone stocks surge on report Pentagon considering stakes in the industry
item.description: Drone stocks surged Thursday on a report the Trump administration is in talks to fund several firms, including one in which Donald Trump Jr. is a shareholder.

item.title: This medtech name on Josh Brown's list is hitting the sweet spot for momentum
item.description: Josh Brown and Sean Russo break down the fundamentals and technicals of this stock.

item.title: Starbucks says afternoon traffic is rising as turnaround starts to take hold
item.description: Starbucks says afternoon traffic is surging, led by menu innovation, as CEO Brian Niccol pushes to turn the chain into an all-day destination.

item.title: Snowflake surges 37% toward best day ever on AI frenzy, fueling software rally
item.description: The Snowflake rally also lifted shares of ServiceNow, Oracle and Palantir, while Salesforce bucked the trend.

item.title: Best Buy stock climbs 15% on earnings beat as retailer aims to reinvigorate sales
item.description: Best Buy reported better-than-expected earnings on Thursday as the company works toward turning around its sales slump.

item.title: Gaming association says states have lost $1 billion in tax revenue due to prediction markets
item.description: Bill Miller, American Gaming Association president and CEO, added that prediction market platforms in his view amount to "backdoor sports betting."

item.title: AI part of another tech layoff as Wix CEO announces 20% workforce cut
item.description: Israel-based web development company Wix is cutting about 20% of its workforce, CEO Avishai Abrahami said.

item.title: More monthly auto loan payments are above $1,000, and most are not for luxury models
item.description: The top five models for the $1,000-plus payments were popular pickup trucks including the Ford F-150, Chevrolet Silverado 1500 and Ram 1500.

item.title: 2 major developments at Meta may have just put a floor in on the struggling stock
item.description: Is now the time to step and buy shares of Meta Platforms?

item.title: CNBC Select’s weekly mortgage rate snapshot: See your options today
item.description: Here's what mortgage rates are for the week ending May 28, according to Freddie Mac.

item.title: Kohl's stock spikes 20% as slumping retailer says sales trends are improving
item.description: Kohl's reported its best comparable sales growth in four years on Thursday even as it saw revenue decline.

item.title: Oura is launching its smallest smart ring yet, shrinking wearable design by 40%
item.description: Oura, the smart ring maker, is set to launch what it says will be the smallest smart ring available in the growing wearables market.

item.title: Oil markets are betting on a swift end to the Iran war. Investors may regret it
item.description: Oil markets remain volatile as traders struggle to interpret contradictory signals on prospects for U.S.-Iran peace agreement.

item.title: CVS to restore coverage of Zepbound, add Eli Lilly's obesity pill to drug plans
item.description: CVS will add Zepbound coverage on Oct. 1, and start covering Lilly's newly approved Foundayo pill on June 1.

item.title: Hospitality baron Fertitta expands leisure push with $18 billion Caesars buyout
item.description: The deal, which will take one of the Las Vegas Strip's most prized casino operators private, includes about $11.9 billion in assumed debt, the companies said.

item.title: The two oil scenarios investors should be positioning for, per Bank of America
item.description: Investors trying to assess just how close U.S. and Iran are to some kind of peace deal can expect two scenarios to play out, the firm said.

item.title: Ferrari CEO defends $640,000 price tag for its first fully electric car
item.description: Ferrari CEO Benedetto Vigna on Thursday said the cost of the manufacturer's new Luce model was a fair price to pay for innovation.

item.title: Rally in chip stocks becomes the most hated in history. Here's the data
item.description: The rally in semiconductor stocks is so incredible, traders can't help but bet against it.
